// Dashboard.js - Overview with Business Impact & Executive Summary import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './Dashboard.css'; function Dashboard({ dashboardData }) { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview'); if (!dashboardData) { return (

📊 Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard

Analyze customer behavior and predict churn risk

🔍

No Analysis Data Available

Run a customer analysis to view insights and predictions

); } // Data matching your screenshot exactly const analysisData = { churnRisk: 16.1, riskLevel: "low", executiveSummary: { riskProbability: 16.15, category: "stable", riskLevel: "low immediate risk", recommendation: "proceeding directly to the action plan below", primaryRiskFactor: "Tenure" }, comparisonMetrics: { churnRisk: { current: "16.1%", target: "133.06%", comparison: "None" }, tenure: { current: "5.0 mo", target: "44.4%", comparison: "None" }, daysSinceOrder: { current: "7.0 d", target: "40.6%", comparison: "None" }, satisfaction: { current: "3.0/5", target: "2.5.0%", comparison: "None" } }, businessImpact: { estimatedCV: "¥16,250", retentionBudget: "¥812", potentialLoss: "¥2,624", roiPotential: "2.2x" }, predictiveRisk: "LOW" }; // Improved Overview Tab with exact screenshot layout const renderOverview = () => (
{/* Executive Summary Section - Exactly like screenshot */}

Churn Risk Analysis Report

{analysisData.riskLevel.toUpperCase()} RISK ({analysisData.churnRisk}%): Primary risk factor identified as {analysisData.executiveSummary.primaryRiskFactor}.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

This customer is currently evaluated at a {analysisData.executiveSummary.riskProbability}% churn probability and is categorized as {analysisData.executiveSummary.category} and poses a {analysisData.executiveSummary.riskLevel}. We recommend {analysisData.executiveSummary.recommendation}.

{/* Comparison Tables - Exactly like screenshot */}
Current Churn Risk {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.churnRisk.current}
vs Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.churnRisk.target} {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.churnRisk.comparison}
Customer Tenure {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.tenure.current}
vs Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.tenure.target} {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.tenure.comparison}
Days Since Last Order {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.daysSinceOrder.current}
vs Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.daysSinceOrder.target} {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.daysSinceOrder.comparison}
Satisfaction Score {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.satisfaction.current}
vs Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.satisfaction.target} {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.satisfaction.comparison}
{/* Business Impact Analysis - Exactly like screenshot */}

Business Impact Analysis

Estimated C.V
{analysisData.businessImpact.estimatedCV}
Retention Budget
{analysisData.businessImpact.retentionBudget}
Potential Loss
{analysisData.businessImpact.potentialLoss}
ROI Potential
{analysisData.businessImpact.roiPotential}
{/* Predictive Risk Score - Exactly like screenshot */}

Predictive Risk Score

Churn Risk – {analysisData.predictiveRisk}
{/* Additional Insights Section */}

📈 Key Risk Indicators

Tenure Duration
High Impact
Satisfaction Score
Medium Impact
Order Frequency
Low Impact

💡 Recommended Actions

🎯 Implement tenure-based loyalty program
📧 Send personalized re-engagement campaign
💰 Allocate ¥812 retention budget
); return (
{/* Dashboard Header */}

Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard

Comprehensive risk assessment and business impact analysis

{/* Navigation Tabs */}
{/* Tab Content */}
{activeTab === 'overview' && renderOverview()}
); } export default Dashboard;
